As we celebrate today the 250th anniversary of the Continental Congress voting for American independence, I hope we are all inspired by what it means to be an American.

26 years ago on this day, I came to this country with nothing - just one suitcase and a lot of inspiration - I https://t.co/S3D2qU5jUV

It should be alarming to all of us to see, on the 250th anniversary, such a rise in socialism, which has destroyed so many lives. 

As someone who grew up under socialism, I am deeply concerned. It is largely the result of Congress mismanaging our country for far too long.

Large meat processors - significantly controlled by Brazil and China - should not use mandatory checkoff dollars from American farmers to lobby against small farmers and processors.

In the last 3 decades, only the top 12% & Americans 55+ have been able to increase their wealth. Now, Social Security & Medicare becoming insolvent soon will put even more pressure on younger generations.

We must adjust our policies to help more Americans build wealth - & soon. https://t.co/ppcukyCB2q

Great meeting with the women farmers from @INFarmBureau and @INBeef. I appreciate their support for the checkoff transparency and farm equipment affordability amendments passed in the Farm Bill. https://t.co/G2AyNLhUsQ

Honored to spend Memorial Day in Westfield, Muncie, and Anderson, #IN05 paying tribute to heroes who made the ultimate sacrifice for our Republic.

A nation is judged by how it honors those who sacrificed for it. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/H0J5NcAdV9

I appreciate the Small Business Administration @AdvocacySBA supporting my Farm Bill amendment exempting farm equipment from unreasonable diesel emission standards, which passed the House on a bipartisan basis.

It will help American farmers survive and make food more affordable.

It was an honor to speak at the Joint Enlistment Ceremony at the @IMS. Seeing bright young people stepping up to serve our nation always gives me hope.

I deeply appreciate them and their families for keeping our Republic strong in honor of all Americans who sacrificed for it. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/0MELb4sfAj

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 2 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Victoria Spartz. The social-media posture reads as security-first / counterterrorism frame because the strongest matched frame is security and counterterrorism language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around security and counterterrorism language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 2 security-frame hits, 0 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 2 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-07-13T16:00:54Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
